resources.string: Bluetooth low latency audio, le scan mode
Enable Low Latency connection for audio to reduce delay.\nThis will increase power consumption of bluetooth device and decrease audio quality.
Opportunistic Mode:\nSpecial mode that passively listen other scan results without starting BLE scans.
Extreme Low Power Mode:\nLowest power consumption among all mode using low duty cycle and long scan interval.
Balanced Low Power Mode:\nLess aggresive Extreme Low Power Mode.
Low Power Mode:\nConsumes the least power to saving battery.
Balanced Mode:\nProvides a good trade-off between scan frequency and power consumption.
Ambient Discovery Mode:\nUsing lower duty cycle and more aggressive scan interval than balanced mode.
Low Latency Mode:\nUsing highest duty cycle to get best result.
